title: Uttama Villain
subTitle: Manoranjan, a superstar, is diagnosed with a brain tumour. However, as a last wish, he sets out to shoot a comedy film with his mentor, Margadarsi, with whom he had a falling out years ago.

title: Chennai Palani Mars

title: Desingu Raja
subTitle: Idhyakani falls for Bindu Madhavi despite their families' bitter rivalry. Later, when the lovers strive to unite them, tensions escalate into a fierce war.

title: Pathu Thala
subTitle: An undercover police officer takes on a mission to take down a crime lord but soon finds himself in a difficult situation when he learns that the crime lord's business intentions are good.

title: Demonte Colony 2
subTitle: A group of friends who return to a cursed location, driven by curiosity and the quest to uncover the truth behind the malevolent spirits that reside there.

title: J Baby
subTitle: J Baby, a mother of two sons, runs away from home. Later, her estranged sons embark on a long journey to bring her back home.

title: Pheonix
subTitle: Young Surya, accused of political murder, endures deadly plots in a juvenile reform school while struggling to survive the brutal realities of life behind bars daily.

title: DD Returns
subTitle: An event manager and his friends hide the money they stole in a haunted bungalow to evade the police but when they go back to retrieve it, the ghosts force them to play a dangerous game.

title: Boomerang
subTitle: Following an accident, a young man gets a major surgery performed on his face. However, when he realises that a lot of people seem to want his new avatar dead, he decides to find out why.

title: Kalki 2898 AD
subTitle: In a post-apocalyptic world, a group of people set out to save a woman pregnant with Lord Vishnu's 10th and final avatar, Kalki, from an evil supreme god-king, Yaskin.

title: Mersal
subTitle: Maaran, a doctor, is falsely arrested for the murder of his colleague, Dr Arjun Zachariah. He soon discovers that the real culprit is a lookalike who aims to expose corruption in the medical industry.

title: House Mates
subTitle: Newlyweds Karthik and Anu move into an old apartment where strange occurrences unsettle their lives, leading them to uncover a paranormal mystery involving another family nearby.

title: Maragadha Naanayam
subTitle: Senguttuvan and Elango work for a smuggler who hires them to retrieve an emerald medallion, a cursed treasure linked to many deaths. Seeking help, they consult a priest and summon three spirits to locate it.

title: Ten Hours
subTitle: A complaint about a missing girl sends Castro, a righteous cop, to investigate a mysterious murder that takes place on an overnight bus, completely unnoticed by its passengers.

title: DD Next Level
subTitle: A brutally honest film critic is invited to an exclusive preview of a horror-laced movie by an enigmatic filmmaker. However, events take a surreal turn when he finds himself trapped inside the film.

title: Salim
subTitle: Salim, a dedicated doctor, is unfairly dismissed from his job for his generosity towards patients. Frustrated and disillusioned with the justice system, he takes matters into his own hands to bring the perpetrators to justice.

title: Brother
subTitle: An exiled Japanese gangster joins his brother's diverse L.A. gang, inspiring them to grow their power and influence in the city's underworld.

title: Bhola Shankar
subTitle: Shankar's wealthy uncle wants him to inherit his property, but only if he marries. Trouble ensues when Panduranga, his childhood friend, learns of this and hatches a plan to help him.

title: Valimai
subTitle: Arjun, a police officer, sets out on a mission to hunt down a group of violent bikers after they are involved in a theft and murder. When a city's crime rate rises, it is up to Arjun, a police officer, to restore order.

title: Lineman
subTitle: In a rural village, Nata the lineman withholds electricity for Shardamma's centenary celebration. Undaunted, villagers unite and adapt to life without modern conveniences.

title: Annapoorani: The Goddess of Food
subTitle: Annapoorani, a girl born into an orthodox Hindu family, aspires to become a top chef. However, she faces obstacles that include prejudice and conventional beliefs.

title: Vadakkupatti Ramasamy
subTitle: Ramasamy exploits villagers' superstitions for profit, but when the temple closes, his source of income gets affected and then, his life takes an unexpected turn.

title: Danny
subTitle: When a policewoman is tasked with solving a puzzling murder case, she teams up with Danny, a highly trained dog. Their investigation soon leads them on a hunt for a sinister group of serial killers.
